allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', pkg.dependencies.next\); console.log\('lucide:', pkg.dependencies['lucide-react']\);")

Bash(node -e "const {createRequire} = require\('module'\); try { const r = createRequire\(require.resolve\('lucide-react/package.json'\)\); const pkg = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react/package.json'\); console.log\('lucide version:', pkg.version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('error:', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./node_modules/lucide-react/package.json'\); const exp = pkg.exports; console.log\(Object.keys\(exp || {}\).slice\(0, 5\)\);")
